quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Imitating Christ And Despising All Vanities On Earth
quotes.title: He Who Follows Me Walks Not In Darkness
quotes.quote: HE WHO follows Me, walks not in darkness," says the Lord.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Having A Humble Opinion Of Self
quotes.title: Every Man Naturally Desires Knowledge
quotes.quote: EVERY man naturally desires knowledge; but what good is knowledge without fear of God?

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: The Doctrine Of Truth
quotes.title: Happy Is He To Whom Truth Manifests Itself
quotes.quote: HAPPY is he to whom truth manifests itself, not in signs and words that fade, but as it actually is.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Prudence In Acti On
quotes.title: Do Not Yield To Every Impulse And Suggestion
quotes.quote: DO NOT yield to every impulse and suggestion but consider things carefully and patiently in the light of God's will.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Reading The Holy Scripture
quotes.title: Truth Not Eloquence Is To Be Sought In
quotes.quote: TRUTH, not eloquence, is to be sought in reading the Holy Scriptures; and every part must be read in the spirit in which it was written.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Unbridled Affections
quotes.title: When A Man Desires A Thing Too Much
quotes.quote: WHEN a man desires a thing too much, he at once becomes ill at ease.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Avoiding False Hope And Pride
quotes.title: Vain Is The Man Who Puts His Trust
quotes.quote: VAIN is the man who puts his trust in men, in created things.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Shunning Over-Familiarity
quotes.title: Do Not Open Your Heart To Every Man
quotes.quote: DO NOT open your heart to every man, but discuss your affairs with one who is wise and who fears God.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Obedience And Subjecti On
quotes.title: It Is A Very Great Thing To Obey
quotes.quote: IT IS a very great thing to obey, to live under a superior and not to be one's own master, for it is much safer to be subject than it is to command.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Avoiding Idle Talk
quotes.title: Shun The Gossip Of Men As Much As
quotes.quote: SHUN the gossip of men as much as possible, for discussion of worldly affairs, even though sincere, is a great distraction inasmuch as we are quickly ensnared and captivated by vanity.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Acquiring Peace And Zeal For Perfecti On
quotes.title: We Should Enjoy Much Peace If We Did
quotes.quote: WE SHOULD enjoy much peace if we did not concern ourselves with what others say and do, for these are no concern of ours.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: The Value Of Adversity
quotes.title: It Is Good For Us To Have Trials
quotes.quote: IT IS good for us to have trials and troubles at times, for they often remind us that we are on probation and ought not to hope in any worldly thing.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Resisting Temptati On
quotes.title: So Long As We Live In This World
quotes.quote: SO LONG as we live in this world we cannot escape suffering and temptation.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Avoiding Rash Judgment
quotes.title: We Frequently Judge That Things Are As We
quotes.quote: We frequently judge that things are as we wish them to be, for through personal feeling true perspective is easily lost.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Works Done In Charity
quotes.title: Never Do Evil For Anything In The World
quotes.quote: NEVER do evil for anything in the world, or for the love of any man.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Bearing With The Faults Of Others
quotes.title: Until God Ordains Otherwise A Man Ought To
quotes.quote: UNTIL God ordains otherwise, a man ought to bear patiently whatever he cannot correct in himself and in others.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Monastic Life
quotes.title: If You Wish Peace And Concord With Others
quotes.quote: IF YOU wish peace and concord with others, you must learn to break your will in many things.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: The Example Set U Sby The Holy Fathers
quotes.title: Consider The Lively Examples Set Us By The
quotes.quote: CONSIDER the lively examples set us by the saints, who possessed the light of true perfection and religion, and you will see how little, how nearly nothing, we do.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: The Practices Of A Good Religious
quotes.title: Each Day We Ought To Renew Our Resolutions
quotes.quote: Each day we ought to renew our resolutions and arouse ourselves to fervor as though it were the first day of our religious life.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: The Love Of Solitude And Silence
quotes.title: Seek A Suitable Time For Leisure And Meditate
quotes.quote: SEEK a suitable time for leisure and meditate often on the favors of God.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Sorrow Of Heart
quotes.title: If You Wish To Make Progress In Virtue
quotes.quote: IF YOU wish to make progress in virtue, live in the fear of the Lord, do not look for too much freedom, discipline your senses, and shun inane silliness.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Thoughts On The Misery Of Man
quotes.title: Wherever You Are Wherever You Go You Are
quotes.quote: WHEREVER you are, wherever you go, you are miserable unless you turn to God.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Thoughts On Death
quotes.title: Very Soon Your Life Here Will End
quotes.quote: VERY soon your life here will end; consider, then, what may be in store for you elsewhere.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Judgment And The Punishment Of S In
quotes.title: In All Things Consider The End
quotes.quote: IN ALL things consider the end; how you shall stand before the strict Judge from Whom nothing is hidden and Who will pronounce judgment in all justice, accepting neither bribes nor excuses.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Zeal In Amending Our Lives
quotes.title: Be Watchful And Diligent In God'S Service And
quotes.quote: BE WATCHFUL and diligent in God's service and often think of why you left the world and came here.

quotes.article_title: Meditati On
quotes.title: Forsake This Wretched World And Your Soul Shall
quotes.quote: Forsake this wretched world and your soul shall find rest.

quotes.article_title: Humility
quotes.title: Be Not Troubled About Those Who Are With
quotes.quote: BE NOT troubled about those who are with you or against you, but take care that God be with you in everything you do.

quotes.article_title: Goodness And Peace In Man
quotes.title: First Keep Peace With Yourself
quotes.quote: FIRST keep peace with yourself; then you will be able to bring peace to others.

quotes.article_title: Purity Of Mind And Unity Of Purpose
quotes.title: A Man Is Raised Up From The Earth
quotes.quote: A MAN is raised up from the earth by two wings -- simplicity and purity.

quotes.article_title: Ourselves
quotes.title: We Must Not Rely Too Much Upon Ourselves
quotes.quote: WE MUST not rely too much upon ourselves, for grace and understanding are often lacking in us.

quotes.article_title: The Joy Of A Good Conscience
quotes.title: Keep Your Conscience Good And You Will Always
quotes.quote: Therefore, keep your conscience good and you will always enjoy happiness, for a good conscience can bear a great deal and can bring joy even in the midst of adversity.

quotes.article_title: Loving Jesus Above All Things
quotes.title: Blessed Is He Who Appreciates What It Is
quotes.quote: BLESSED is he who appreciates what it is to love Jesus and who despises himself for the sake of Jesus.

quotes.article_title: The Intimate Friendship Of Jesus
quotes.title: When Jesus Is Near All Is Well And
quotes.quote: WHEN Jesus is near, all is well and nothing seems difficult.

quotes.article_title: Wanting No Share In Comfort
quotes.title: It Is Not Hard To Spurn Human Consolation
quotes.quote: IT IS not hard to spurn human consolation when we have the divine.

quotes.article_title: Appreciating God ' Sgrace
quotes.title: Why Do You Look For Rest When You
quotes.quote: WHY do you look for rest when you were born to work?

quotes.article_title: Few Love The Cross Of Jesus
quotes.title: Jesus Has Always Many Who Love His Heavenly
quotes.quote: JESUS has always many who love His heavenly kingdom, but few who bear His cross.

quotes.article_title: The Royal Road Of The Holy Cross
quotes.title: This Sign Of The Cross Will Be In
quotes.quote: This sign of the cross will be in the heavens when the Lord comes to judge.

quotes.article_title: The Inward Conversation Of Christ With The Faithful Soul
quotes.title: I Will Hear What The Lord God Will
quotes.quote: I WILL hear what the Lord God will speak in me."24 Blessed is the soul who hears the Lord speaking within her, who receives the word of consolation from His lips.

quotes.article_title: Truth Speaks Inwardly Without The Sound Of Words
quotes.title: Give Me Understanding That I May Know Thine
quotes.quote: Give me understanding that I may know Thine ordinances26 . . .

quotes.article_title: Listen Humbly To The Words Of God. Many Do Not Heed Them
quotes.title: My Words Are Spirit And Life And They
quotes.quote: My words are spirit and life, and they are not to be weighed by man's understanding.

quotes.article_title: We Must Walk Before God In Humility And Truth
quotes.title: He Who Walks Before Me In Truth Shall
quotes.quote: He who walks before Me in truth shall be defended from the attacks of evil, and the truth shall free him from seducers and from the slanders of wicked men.

quotes.article_title: The Wonderful Effect Of Divine Love
quotes.title: Thanks To You O Father Of Mercies God
quotes.quote: Thanks to You, O Father of mercies, God of all consolation, Who with Your comfort sometimes refresh me, who am not worthy of it.

quotes.article_title: The Proving Of A True Lover
quotes.title: The Brave Lover Stands Firm In Temptations And
quotes.quote: The brave lover stands firm in temptations and pays no heed to the crafty persuasions of the enemy.

quotes.article_title: Grace Must Be Hidden Under The Mantle Of Humility
quotes.title: Do Not Cling Too Closely To This Affection
quotes.quote: Do not cling too closely to this affection, for it may quickly be changed to its opposite.

quotes.article_title: Self-Abasement In The Sight Of God
quotes.title: If I Consider Myself Anything More Than This
quotes.quote: If I consider myself anything more than this, behold You stand against me, and my sins bear witness to the truth which I cannot contradict.

quotes.article_title: All Things Should Be Referred To God As Their Last End
quotes.title: With This Intention Your Affections Which Are Too
quotes.quote: With this intention your affections, which are too often perversely inclined to self and to creatures, will be purified.

quotes.article_title: To Despise The World And Serve God Is Sweet
quotes.title: I Will Speak To The Hearing Of My
quotes.quote: I will speak to the hearing of my God, my Lord, and my King Who is in heaven.

quotes.article_title: The Longings Of Our Hearts Must B Eexamined And Moderated
quotes.title: Desires Very Often Inflame You And Drive You
quotes.quote: Desires very often inflame you and drive you madly on, but consider whether you act for My honor, or for your own advantage.

quotes.article_title: Acquiring Patience In The Fight Against Concupiscence
quotes.title: No Matter What Plans I Make For My
quotes.quote: No matter what plans I make for my own peace, my life cannot be free from struggle and sorrow.

quotes.article_title: The Obedience Of One Humbly Subject To The Example Of Jesus Christ
quotes.title: Likewise He Who Seeks Private Benefits For Himself
quotes.quote: Likewise he who seeks private benefits for himself loses those which are common to all.

quotes.article_title: Consider The Hidden Judgments Of God Lest You Become Proud Of Your Own Good Deeds
quotes.title: You Shake All My Bones With Fear And
quotes.quote: You shake all my bones with fear and trembling, and my soul is very much afraid.

quotes.article_title: How One Should Feel And Speak On Every Desirable Thing
quotes.title: If It Be To Your Honor Lord Be
quotes.quote: If it be to Your honor, Lord, be it done in Your name.

quotes.article_title: True Comfort Is To Be Sought In God Alone
quotes.title: If I Alone Should Have All The World'S
quotes.quote: For if I alone should have all the world's comforts and could enjoy all its delights, it is certain that they could not long endure.

quotes.article_title: All Our Care Is To Be Placed In God
quotes.title: You Think As A Man
quotes.quote: You think as a man; you feel in many things as human affection persuades.

quotes.article_title: Temporal Sufferings Should Be Borne Patiently, After The Example Of Christ
quotes.title: From The Moment Of My Birth To My
quotes.quote: From the moment of My birth to My death on the cross, suffering did not leave Me.

quotes.article_title: True Patience In Suffering
quotes.title: Think Of My Suffering And That Of The
quotes.quote: Think of My suffering and that of the saints, and cease complaining.

quotes.article_title: Confessing Our Weakness In The Miseries Of Life
quotes.title: Often It Is A Small Thing That Makes
quotes.quote: Often it is a small thing that makes me downcast and sad.

quotes.article_title: Above All Goods And All Gifts We Must Rest In God
quotes.title: You O Lord My God Are Above All
quotes.quote: For You, O Lord my God, are above all things the best.

quotes.article_title: Remember The Innumerable Gifts Of God
quotes.title: Let Me Remember Your Blessings All Of Them
quotes.quote: Let me remember Your blessings -- all of them and each single one of them -- with great reverence and care so that henceforth I may return worthy thanks for them.

quotes.article_title: Four Things Which Bring Great Peace
quotes.title: Seek Child To Do The Will Of Others
quotes.quote: Seek, child, to do the will of others rather than your own.

quotes.article_title: Avoiding Curious Inquiry About The Lives Of Others
quotes.title: What Is It To You If A Man
quotes.quote: What is it to you if a man is such and such, if another does or says this or that?

quotes.article_title: The Basis Of Firm Peace Of Heart And True Progress
quotes.title: My Peace Is With The Humble And Meek
quotes.quote: My peace is with the humble and meek of heart: your peace will be in much patience.

quotes.article_title: The Excellence Of A Free Mind, Gained Through Prayer Rather Than By Study
quotes.title: Keep Me I Beg You Most Merciful God
quotes.quote: Keep me, I beg You, most merciful God, from the cares of this life, lest I be too much entangled in them.

quotes.article_title: Self-Love Is The Greatest Hindrance To The Highest Good
quotes.title: You Must Know That Self Love Is More
quotes.quote: You must know that self-love is more harmful to you than anything else in the world.

quotes.article_title: Strength Against Slander
quotes.title: You Ought To Think Worse Things Of Yourself
quotes.quote: You ought to think worse things of yourself and to believe that no one is weaker than yourself.

quotes.article_title: How We Must Call Up On And Bless The Lord When Trouble Presses
quotes.title: I Cannot Escape It Yet I Must Fly
quotes.quote: I cannot escape it, yet I must fly to You that You may help me and turn it to my good.

quotes.article_title: The Quest Of Divine Help And Confidence In Regaining Grace
quotes.title: Come To Me When All Is Not Well
quotes.quote: Come to Me when all is not well with you.

quotes.article_title: Tofind The Creator, Forsake All Creatures
quotes.title: As Long As Anything Holds Me Back I
quotes.quote: For as long as anything holds me back, I cannot freely fly to You.

quotes.article_title: Self-Denial And The Renunciation Of Evil Appetites
quotes.title: They Are Unsettled By Covetousness And Curiosity Always
quotes.quote: They are unsettled by covetousness and curiosity, always searching for ease and not for the things of Christ, often devising and framing that which will not last, for anything that is not of God will fail completely.

quotes.article_title: Restlessness Of Soul--Directing Our Final Intenti On Toward God
quotes.title: As Long As You Live You Will Be
quotes.quote: As long as you live you will be subject to changeableness in spite of yourself.

quotes.article_title: God Is Sweet Above All Things And In All Things To Those Who Love Him
quotes.title: What More Do I Wish For
quotes.quote: What more do I wish for; what greater happiness can I desire?

quotes.article_title: There Is No Security From Temptati On In This Life
quotes.title: You Are Subject To Attack From The Right
quotes.quote: You are subject to attack from the right and the left.

quotes.article_title: The Va In Judgments Of Men
quotes.title: It Is Good And Blessed To Suffer Such
quotes.quote: For it is good and blessed to suffer such things, and they will not weigh heavily on the humble heart that trusts in God rather than in itself.

quotes.article_title: Pure And Entire Resignation Of Self To Obta In Freedom Of Heart
quotes.title: Give Up Your Own Self Will Your Possessions
quotes.quote: Give up your own self-will, your possessions, and you shall always gain.

quotes.article_title: The Right Ordering Of External Affairs; Recourse To God In Dangers
quotes.title: Moses Always Had Recourse To The Tabernacle For
quotes.quote: For Moses always had recourse to the tabernacle for the solution of doubts and questions, and fled to prayer for support in dangers and the evil deeds of men.

quotes.article_title: A Man Should Not Be Unduly Solicitous About His Affairs
quotes.title: Await My Ordering Of It And It Will
quotes.quote: Await My ordering of it and it will be to your advantage.

quotes.article_title: Man Has No Good In Himself And Can Glory In Nothing
quotes.title: What Has Man Deserved That You Should Give
quotes.quote: What has man deserved that You should give him Your grace?

quotes.article_title: Contempt For All Earthly Honor
quotes.title: Lift Up Your Heart To Me In Heaven
quotes.quote: Lift up your heart to Me in heaven and the contempt of men on earth will not grieve you.

quotes.article_title: Peace Is Not To B Eplaced In Men
quotes.title: If You Have Recourse To The Ever Living
quotes.quote: But if you have recourse to the ever-living and abiding Truth, you will not grieve if a friend should die or forsake you.

quotes.article_title: Beware Va In And Worldly Knowledge
quotes.title: The Kingdom Of Heaven Consists Not In Talk
quotes.quote: For the kingdom of heaven consists not in talk but in virtue.

quotes.article_title: Do Not B Econcerned About Outward Things
quotes.title: There Are Many Things Too Which It Is
quotes.quote: There are many things, too, which it is well to pass by with a deaf ear, thinking, instead, of what is more to your peace.

quotes.article_title: All Men Are Not To Be Believed, For It Is Easy To Err In Speech
quotes.title: How Often Have I Failed To Find Faithfulness
quotes.quote: How often have I failed to find faithfulness in places where I thought I possessed it!

quotes.article_title: Trust In God Against Slander
quotes.title: They Fly Through The Air But Hurt Not
quotes.quote: They fly through the air but hurt not a stone.

quotes.article_title: Every Trial Must Be Borne For The Sake Of Eternal Life
quotes.title: I Am Able To Reward You Beyond All
quotes.quote: I am able to reward you beyond all means and measure.

quotes.article_title: The Day Of Eternity And The Distresses Of This Life
quotes.title: O Most Bright Day Of Eternity Which Night
quotes.quote: O most bright day of eternity, which night does not darken, but which the highest truth ever enlightens!

quotes.article_title: The Desire Of Eternal Life; The Great Rewards Promised To Those Who Struggle
quotes.title: Give Deepest Thanks To The Heavenly Goodness Which
quotes.quote: Give deepest thanks to the heavenly Goodness which deals with you so understandingly, visits you so mercifully, stirs you so fervently, and sustains you so powerfully lest under your own weight you sink down to earthly things.

quotes.article_title: How A Desolate Personought To Commit Himself In To The Hands Of God
quotes.title: As You Will So Is It Done

quotes.article_title: Amanought Not To Consider Himself Worthy Of Consolati On, But Rather Deserving Of Chastisement
quotes.title: Hence I Deserve Only To Be Scourged And
quotes.quote: Hence, I deserve only to be scourged and punished because I have offended You often and grievously, and have sinned greatly in many things.

quotes.article_title: God 'Sgrace Is Not Given To The Earthly Minded
quotes.title: Seek No Man'S Conversation But Rather Pour Forth
quotes.quote: Seek no man's conversation, but rather pour forth devout prayer to God that you may keep your mind contrite and your heart pure.

quotes.article_title: The Different Motions Of Nature And Grace
quotes.title: Grace Walks In Simplicity Turns Away From All
quotes.quote: But grace walks in simplicity, turns away from all appearance of evil, offers no deceits, and does all purely for God in whom she rests as her last end.

quotes.title: There Is Need Of Your Grace And Of
quotes.quote: There is need of Your grace, and of great grace, in order to overcome a nature prone to evil from youth.

quotes.article_title: We Ought To Deny Ourselves And Imitate Christ Through Bearing The Cross
quotes.title: I Am The Way Which You Must Follow
quotes.quote: I am the Way which you must follow, the Truth which you must believe, the Life for which you must hope.

quotes.article_title: A Man Should Not Be Too Downcast When He Falls In To Defects
quotes.title: It Is Not The First Nor Is It
quotes.quote: It is not the first, nor is it anything new, and if you live long it will not be the last.

quotes.article_title: High Matters And The Hidden Judgments Of God Are Not To B Escrutinized
quotes.title: They Nourish Pride And Vainglory Whence Arise Envy
quotes.quote: They nourish pride and vainglory, whence arise envy and quarrels, when one proudly tries to exalt one saint and the other another.

quotes.article_title: All Hope And Trust Are To Be Fixed In God Alone
quotes.title: I Had Rather Be Poor For Your Sake
quotes.quote: I had rather be poor for Your sake than rich without You.

quotes.article_title: The Great Reverence With Which We Should Receive Christ
quotes.title: Gladly I Accept Them From Your Lips That
quotes.quote: Gladly I accept them from Your lips that they may be the more deeply impressed in my heart.

quotes.article_title: God 'Sgreat Goodness And Love Is Shown To Man In This Sacrament
quotes.title: How Dares The Sinner To Appear In Your
quotes.quote: How dares the sinner to appear in Your presence, and You, how do You condescend to come to the sinner?

quotes.article_title: It Is Profitable To Receive Communionoften
quotes.title: Gladden Then This Day The Soul Of Your
quotes.quote: Gladden, then, this day the soul of Your servant because I have raised my heart to You, O Lord Jesus.

quotes.article_title: Many Blessings Are Given Those Who Receive Communi On Worthily
quotes.title: Enlighten My Eyes To Behold This Great Mystery
quotes.quote: Enlighten my eyes to behold this great Mystery, and give me strength to believe in it with firm faith.

quotes.article_title: The Dignity Of The Sacrament And Of The Priesthood
quotes.title: Great Is The Mystery And Great The Dignity
quotes.quote: Great is the Mystery and great the dignity of priests to whom is given that which has not been granted the angels.

quotes.article_title: The Examination Of Conscience And The Resoluti On To Amend
quotes.title: Then If Time Permits Confess To God In
quotes.quote: Then if time permits, confess to God in the secret depths of your heart all the miseries your passions have caused.

quotes.article_title: The Offering Of Christ On The Cross; Our Offering
quotes.title: Just As It Would Not Be Enough For
quotes.quote: Just as it would not be enough for you to have everything if you did not have Me, so whatever you give cannot please Me if you do not give yourself.

quotes.article_title: We Shouldoffer Ourselves And All That We Have To God, Praying For All
quotes.title: Receive Me With This Holy Offering Of Your
quotes.quote: Receive me with this holy offering of Your precious Body which also I make to You this day, in the presence of angels invisibly attending, for my salvation and that of all Your people.

quotes.article_title: Do Not Lightly Forego Holy Communi On
quotes.title: No Attention However Must Be Paid To His
quotes.quote: No attention, however, must be paid to his cunning wiles, no matter how base and horrible -- all his suggestions must be cast back upon his head.

quotes.article_title: The Body Of Christ And Sacred Scripture Are Most Necessary To A Faithful Soul
quotes.title: Certainly In Your Sight Before Your Holy Angels
quotes.quote: Certainly in Your sight, before Your holy angels, my whole heart ought to be inflamed and weep for joy.

quotes.article_title: The Communicant Should Prepare Himself For Christ With Great Care
quotes.title: If You Wish That I Come To You
quotes.quote: If you wish that I come to you and remain with you, purge out the old leaven and make clean the dwelling of your heart.

quotes.article_title: With All Her Heart The Devout Soul Should Desire Uni On With Christ In The Sacrament
quotes.title: You In Truth Are My Beloved Chosen From
quotes.quote: You in truth are my Beloved, chosen from thousands, in Whom my soul is happy to dwell all the days of her life.

quotes.article_title: The Ardent Longing Of Devout Men For The Body Of Christ
quotes.title: They Whose Hearts Burn So Ardently Within Them
quotes.quote: They whose hearts burn so ardently within them when Jesus lives with them truly know their Lord in the breaking of bread.

quotes.article_title: The Grace Of Devoti On Is Acquired Through Humility And Self-Denial
quotes.title: At Times He Grants At The End What
quotes.quote: At times He grants at the end what He has denied from the beginning of prayer.

quotes.article_title: We Should Show Our Needs To Christ And Ask His Grace
quotes.title: You Know What Good Things I Am Most
quotes.quote: You know what good things I am most in need of and how poor I am in virtue.

quotes.article_title: The Burning Love And Strong Desire To Receive Christ
quotes.title: Accept O Lord My God My Promises And
quotes.quote: Accept, O Lord my God, my promises and desires of giving You infinite praise and boundless benediction, which in the vastness of Your ineffable greatness are justly due You.

quotes.article_title: Man Should Not Scrutinize This Sacrament In Curiosity, But Humbly Imitate Christ And Submit Reas On To Holy Faith
quotes.title: Blest Is The Simplicity That Leaves The Difficult
quotes.quote: Blest is the simplicity that leaves the difficult way of dispute and goes forward on the level, firm path of God's commandments.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Imitating Christ And Despising All Vanities On Earth
quotes.title: The Teaching Of Christ Is More Excellent Than
quotes.quote: The teaching of Christ is more excellent than all the advice of the saints, and he who has His spirit will find in it a hidden manna.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Having A Humble Opinion Of Self
quotes.title: If I Knew All Things In The World
quotes.quote: If I knew all things in the world and had not charity, what would it profit me before God Who will judge me by my deeds?

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: The Doctrine Of Truth
quotes.title: Neglect Of Things Which Are Profitable And Necessary
quotes.quote: Neglect of things which are profitable and necessary and undue concern with those which are irrelevant and harmful, are great folly.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Prudence In Acti On
quotes.title: Not To Act Rashly Or To Cling Obstinately
quotes.quote: Not to act rashly or to cling obstinately to one's opinion, not to believe everything people say or to spread abroad the gossip one has heard, is great wisdom.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Reading The Holy Scripture
quotes.title: We Ought Not To Be Swayed By The
quotes.quote: We ought not to be swayed by the authority of the writer, whether he be a great literary light or an insignificant person, but by the love of simple truth.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Unbridled Affections
quotes.title: Hence It Makes Him Sad To Forego Them
quotes.quote: Hence it makes him sad to forego them; he is quick to anger if reproved.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Avoiding False Hope And Pride
quotes.title: Do What Lies In Your Power And God
quotes.quote: Do what lies in your power and God will aid your good will.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Shunning Over-Familiarity
quotes.title: Be Not Intimate With Any Woman But Generally
quotes.quote: Be not intimate with any woman, but generally commend all good women to God.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Obedience And Subjecti On
quotes.title: Go Where You May You Will Find No
quotes.quote: Go where you may, you will find no rest except in humble obedience to the rule of authority.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Avoiding Idle Talk
quotes.title: We Do So Because We Seek Comfort From
quotes.quote: We do so because we seek comfort from one another's conversation and wish to ease the mind wearied by diverse thoughts.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Acquiring Peace And Zeal For Perfecti On
quotes.title: Why Were Some Of The Saints So Perfect
quotes.quote: Why were some of the saints so perfect and so given to contemplation?

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: The Value Of Adversity
quotes.title: When To All Outward Appearances Men Give Us
quotes.quote: When to all outward appearances men give us no credit, when they do not think well of us, then we are more inclined to seek God Who sees our hearts.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Resisting Temptati On
quotes.title: The Saints All Passed Through Many Temptations And
quotes.quote: The saints all passed through many temptations and trials to profit by them, while those who could not resist became reprobate and fell away.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Avoiding Rash Judgment
quotes.title: They Seem Even To Enjoy Peace Of Mind
quotes.quote: They seem even to enjoy peace of mind when things happen according to their wish and liking, but if otherwise than they desire, they are soon disturbed and saddened.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Works Done In Charity
quotes.title: Without Charity External Work Is Of No Value
quotes.quote: Without charity external work is of no value, but anything done in charity, be it ever so small and trivial, is entirely fruitful inasmuch as God weighs the love with which a man acts rather than the deed itself.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Bearing With The Faults Of Others
quotes.title: Try To Bear Patiently With The Defects And
quotes.quote: Try to bear patiently with the defects and infirmities of others, whatever they may be, because you also have many a fault which others must endure.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Monastic Life
quotes.title: If You Would Persevere In Seeking Perfection You
quotes.quote: If you would persevere in seeking perfection, you must consider yourself a pilgrim, an exile on earth.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: The Example Set U Sby The Holy Fathers
quotes.title: They Hated Their Lives On Earth That They
quotes.quote: They hated their lives on earth that they might have life in eternity.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: The Practices Of A Good Religious
quotes.title: If The Strong Willed Man Fails Frequently What
quotes.quote: If the strong-willed man fails frequently, what of the man who makes up his mind seldom or half-heartedly?

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: The Love Of Solitude And Silence
quotes.title: Very Many Great Saints Avoided The Company Of
quotes.quote: Very many great saints avoided the company of men wherever possible and chose to serve God in retirement.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Sorrow Of Heart
quotes.title: Lighthearted And Heedless Of Our Defects We Do
quotes.quote: Lighthearted and heedless of our defects, we do not feel the real sorrows of our souls, but often indulge in empty laughter when we have good reason to weep.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Thoughts On The Misery Of Man
quotes.title: There Is No One In The World Be
quotes.quote: There is no one in the world, be he Pope or king, who does not suffer trial and anguish.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Thoughts On Death
quotes.title: In Every Deed And Every Thought Act As
quotes.quote: Therefore, in every deed and every thought, act as though you were to die this very day.

quotes.book_title: Thoughts Helpful in the Life of the Soul
quotes.article_title: Judgment And The Punishment Of S In
quotes.title: In This Life Your Work Is Profitable Your
quotes.quote: In this life your work is profitable, your tears acceptable, your sighs audible, your sorrow satisfying and purifying.
